since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.70%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.15% · Gold +0.35% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.70%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.70%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +6.08%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +6.08%, DLR +3.43%, INTC +3.37%, UPST +3.04%, PUBM +2.44%. Laggards: SKHY -2.35%, BABA -1.62%, CGNX -1.51%, FIX -1.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.73% at $117.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
